email: I haven't received my order #12345 from last week

analysis.suggested_reply:
Dear John,

Thank you for contacting us about order #12345. I understand your concern about not receiving it yet.

Let me check the status for you. Orders typically take 3-5 business days for delivery, and I see yours was shipped on [date].

I'll investigate this immediately and provide you with a tracking update within 24 hours.

Best regards,
Support Team

email: Your service is terrible! I want a refund NOW!

analysis.suggested_reply:
Dear Jane,

I'm very sorry to hear about your negative experience. This is not the level of service we aim to provide.

I understand you want a refund, and I'll help you with that immediately. Please allow me 2-3 business days to process your refund.

I've escalated your case to ensure this receives proper attention.

Sincerely,
Support Team

email: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please fix this immediately. My account is user@example.com

analysis.suggested_reply:
Dear Michael,

I apologize for the duplicate charge on your subscription. I understand how frustrating this can be.

I've reviewed your account and confirmed the double billing. I've already initiated a refund for the duplicate charge, which should appear in your account within 3-5 business days.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

Best regards,
Billing Support
